current_run.description: Given an oracle for a boolean function f(x) which computes (x_i * x_j + x_k) mod 2 for unknown distinct bit indices i, j, and an unknown bit index k, find the triplet (i, j, k). The indices i and j are distinct, and k can be any valid index. All indices are derived from a single integer secret 's'. This is a non-linear problem.
